title: Essential Dark Pack Fix
description: Do you use "Essential Dark Pack?" If you do you may notice the fact that you can barely see your armor in your HUD and in a Smithing Table. This pack fixes that.
body:
Here is the link to Essential Dark Pack if you would like to use it with my pack!
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/essential-dark-pack

Make sure you have this resource pack ABOVE Essential Dark Pack
